entities.name: Duty of Care Travel Policy
entities.description: Organization-wide policy governing safety, security, and wellbeing of personnel traveling internationally.

source_anchor.source_text: Duty of Care Travel Policy v2.1

entities.name: Air Travel
entities.description: Section governing all air travel arrangements, booking requirements, and class-of-service rules.

source_anchor.source_text: Section 4: Air Travel

entities.name: Lodging & Accommodation
entities.description: Section governing hotel bookings, rate limits, and accommodation standards.

source_anchor.source_text: Section 5: Lodging

entities.name: Ground Transportation
entities.description: Section governing rental cars, ride-shares, and ground transport options.

source_anchor.source_text: Section 6: Ground Transportation

entities.name: Meals & Entertainment
entities.description: Section governing meal allowances and entertainment expenses during travel.

source_anchor.source_text: Section 7: Meals

entities.name: High-Risk Zone Travel
entities.description: Section governing travel to destinations classified as elevated or extreme risk.

source_anchor.source_text: Section 8: High-Risk Zone Travel

entities.name: Emergency Procedures
entities.description: Section governing emergency response, evacuation, and crisis management during travel.

source_anchor.source_text: Section 9: Emergency Procedures

entities.name: Economy Class Default
entities.description: All domestic and international flights under 6 hours must be booked in economy class.

source_anchor.source_text: All flights under 6 hours shall be booked in economy class

entities.rule_text: All flights under 6 hours shall be booked in economy class.

entities.name: Business Class for Long-Haul
entities.description: Flights over 6 hours may be booked in business class with manager pre-approval.

source_anchor.source_text: Flights exceeding 6 hours may be booked in business class with prior manager approval

entities.rule_text: Flights exceeding 6 hours may be booked in business class with prior manager approval.

entities.name: 14-Day Advance Booking
entities.description: Air tickets should be purchased at least 14 days before departure to secure lowest fares.

source_anchor.source_text: Tickets should be purchased at least 14 calendar days before departure

entities.rule_text: Tickets should be purchased at least 14 calendar days before departure.

entities.name: Preferred Airline Selection
entities.description: Travelers must use contracted preferred airlines unless the fare differential exceeds $200.

source_anchor.source_text: Preferred airlines must be used unless fare differential exceeds $200

entities.rule_text: Preferred airlines must be used unless fare differential exceeds $200.

entities.name: Hotel Rate Cap
entities.description: Hotel bookings must not exceed the per-diem rate for the destination city as published by GSA.

source_anchor.source_text: Hotel rates shall not exceed the published GSA per-diem rate

entities.rule_text: Hotel rates shall not exceed the published GSA per-diem rate for the destination city.

entities.name: Hotel Safety Features Required
entities.description: Hotels must have functioning door locks, in-room safes, and 24-hour front desk in high-risk zones.

source_anchor.source_text: Hotels in high-risk zones must have functioning locks, safes, and 24-hour front desk

entities.rule_text: Hotels in high-risk zones must have functioning door locks, in-room safes, and 24-hour front desk.

entities.name: Compact/Mid-Size Default
entities.description: Rental cars must be compact or mid-size unless group travel or security requirements justify larger.

source_anchor.source_text: Rental cars shall be compact or mid-size

entities.rule_text: Rental cars shall be compact or mid-size.

entities.name: Meal Per Diem Limit
entities.description: Daily meal expenses must not exceed $75 domestic / $100 international without pre-approval.

source_anchor.source_text: Meal expenses shall not exceed $75 domestic or $100 international per day

entities.rule_text: Meal expenses shall not exceed $75 domestic or $100 international per day.

entities.name: High-Risk Zone Pre-Approval
entities.description: Travel to countries classified as High or Extreme risk requires written approval from the Executive Director.

source_anchor.source_text: Travel to High or Extreme risk destinations requires Executive Director written approval

entities.rule_text: Travel to High or Extreme risk destinations requires Executive Director written approval.

entities.name: Pre-Travel Security Briefing
entities.description: All travelers to high-risk zones must complete a security briefing within 72 hours of departure.

source_anchor.source_text: Security briefing must be completed within 72 hours of departure

entities.rule_text: Security briefing must be completed within 72 hours of departure for high-risk zone travel.

entities.name: Daily Check-In Protocol
entities.description: Travelers in high-risk zones must check in with their manager or security focal point daily.

source_anchor.source_text: Daily check-in with manager or security focal point is mandatory

entities.rule_text: Daily check-in with manager or security focal point is mandatory for high-risk zone travelers.

entities.name: Emergency Evacuation Plan
entities.description: An evacuation plan must be filed with the Security Office before any high-risk zone travel commences.

source_anchor.source_text: Evacuation plan must be filed with Security Office

entities.rule_text: An evacuation plan must be filed with the Security Office before high-risk zone travel.

entities.name: Medical Upgrade Exception
entities.description: Travelers with documented medical conditions may upgrade to business class on flights of any duration.

source_anchor.source_text: Medical exceptions allow business class on all flights with documentation

entities.name: Emergency Booking Exception
entities.description: In emergencies, flights may be booked without the 14-day advance requirement with post-facto justification.

source_anchor.source_text: Emergency bookings exempt from 14-day rule with post-facto justification

entities.name: Traveler
entities.description: Any employee, contractor, or consultant traveling on behalf of the organization.

source_anchor.source_text: Traveler means any employee, contractor, or consultant traveling on organization business

entities.name: Executive Director
entities.description: Senior leader who approves high-risk travel and policy exceptions.

source_anchor.source_text: Executive Director approves all high-risk zone travel

entities.name: Travel Manager
entities.description: Manages day-to-day travel operations and booking approvals.

source_anchor.source_text: Travel Manager oversees booking compliance and vendor relations

entities.name: Security Office
entities.description: Organizational unit responsible for travel risk assessment, security briefings, and evacuation planning.

source_anchor.source_text: The Security Office is responsible for risk assessment and security briefings

entities.name: Human Resources
entities.description: Handles medical exceptions, insurance enrollment, and duty of care compliance tracking.

source_anchor.source_text: HR manages medical exceptions and insurance enrollment

entities.name: Finance Department
entities.description: Reviews and approves travel expense reports, enforces rate caps and per-diem limits.

source_anchor.source_text: Finance reviews all travel expense reports

entities.name: United Airlines (Preferred)
entities.description: Contracted preferred airline with negotiated corporate rates.

source_anchor.source_text: United Airlines is the preferred carrier with negotiated corporate rates

entities.name: Marriott International (Preferred)
entities.description: Preferred hotel chain with negotiated government/NGO rates.

source_anchor.source_text: Marriott is the preferred lodging provider

entities.name: International SOS
entities.description: Global travel security and medical assistance provider.

source_anchor.source_text: International SOS provides emergency medical evacuation and security assistance

entities.name: Commercial Air
entities.description: Scheduled commercial airline flights.

source_anchor.source_text: Commercial air travel

entities.booking_channel: Preferred TMC or approved online booking tool
entities.requires_preapproval: Only for business class or above

entities.name: Rental Car
entities.description: Self-drive rental vehicles for ground transportation.

source_anchor.source_text: Rental cars

entities.booking_channel: Preferred TMC or direct with approved vendors

entities.name: Rideshare/Taxi
entities.description: On-demand ride services and taxis for local ground transportation.

source_anchor.source_text: Rideshare and taxi services

entities.name: Economy Class
entities.description: Standard economy class air travel — the default for all flights under 6 hours.

source_anchor.source_text: Economy class is the default

entities.name: Business Class
entities.description: Business class air travel — permitted for flights over 6 hours with manager approval.

source_anchor.source_text: Business class permitted for flights over 6 hours

entities.name: Standard Hotel
entities.description: Standard hotel accommodation up to GSA per-diem rate.

source_anchor.source_text: Standard hotel accommodation

entities.name: Organizational Safe House
entities.description: Secure organizational accommodation in high-risk zones.

source_anchor.source_text: Organizational safe houses in high-risk zones

entities.name: Conference Attendance
entities.description: Travel for attending industry conferences, workshops, or training events.

source_anchor.source_text: Conference attendance travel

entities.name: Field Mission
entities.description: Travel to field offices or project sites, often in developing countries or conflict zones.

source_anchor.source_text: Field mission travel to project sites

entities.name: Emergency Response Deployment
entities.description: Rapid deployment travel in response to humanitarian crises or natural disasters.

source_anchor.source_text: Emergency response deployment

entities.name: Flight Delay >4 Hours
entities.description: A scheduled flight is delayed by more than 4 hours, potentially requiring rebooking, hotel, and meal expenses.

source_anchor.source_text: When a flight is delayed more than 4 hours

entities.typical_response: Rebooking, hotel accommodation, meal per diem

entities.name: Flight Cancellation
entities.description: A scheduled flight is cancelled, requiring immediate rebooking and possible accommodation.

source_anchor.source_text: In the event of a flight cancellation

entities.typical_response: Next available flight, emergency hotel if overnight

entities.name: Security Incident at Destination
entities.description: A security event (civil unrest, terrorist attack, natural disaster) occurs at or near the traveler's destination.

source_anchor.source_text: Security incident at destination requiring evacuation assessment

entities.trigger_condition: Security advisory upgrade or incident report
entities.typical_response: Risk reassessment, potential evacuation, daily check-ins

entities.name: Medical Emergency During Travel
entities.description: Traveler experiences a medical emergency requiring immediate medical attention or evacuation.

source_anchor.source_text: Medical emergency during travel

entities.typical_response: International SOS activation, medical evacuation, insurance claim

entities.name: Missed Connection
entities.description: Traveler misses a connecting flight due to delay, requiring rebooking.

source_anchor.source_text: Missed connections due to delay

entities.trigger_condition: Connecting flight missed due to inbound delay
entities.typical_response: Next available connection, hotel if overnight required

entities.name: Domestic (US)
entities.description: Travel within the United States and its territories.

source_anchor.source_text: Domestic travel within the United States

entities.name: International (Standard Risk)
entities.description: Travel to countries with no elevated security advisory.

source_anchor.source_text: International travel to standard-risk countries

entities.name: High-Risk Zones
entities.description: Countries or regions with State Department Level 3-4 advisories or active conflict.

source_anchor.source_text: High-risk zones as designated by State Department Level 3-4

entities.applicable_regulations: Executive Director approval, security briefing, daily check-in

entities.name: Airfare
entities.description: Cost of airline tickets including base fare, taxes, and seat selection fees.

source_anchor.source_text: Airfare expenses

entities.name: Lodging
entities.description: Hotel and accommodation costs during official travel.

source_anchor.source_text: Lodging expenses

entities.name: Meals
entities.description: Food and non-alcoholic beverage costs during travel.

source_anchor.source_text: Meal expenses

entities.name: Ground Transportation
entities.description: Rental car, taxi, rideshare, and parking costs.

source_anchor.source_text: Ground transportation expenses

entities.name: Domestic Hotel Cap
entities.description: Maximum reimbursable hotel rate for domestic travel per GSA tables.

source_anchor.source_text: Domestic hotel reimbursement capped at GSA rate

entities.name: Domestic Meal Per Diem
entities.description: Maximum daily meal reimbursement for domestic travel.

source_anchor.source_text: $75 per day domestic meal limit

entities.name: International Meal Per Diem
entities.description: Maximum daily meal reimbursement for international travel.

source_anchor.source_text: $100 per day international meal limit

entities.name: Corporate Credit Card
entities.description: Organization-issued credit card — the required payment method for all travel expenses.

source_anchor.source_text: Corporate credit card must be used for all travel expenses

entities.name: Personal Card (Reimbursement)
entities.description: Personal payment method used when corporate card is unavailable — requires expense report.

source_anchor.source_text: Personal card may be used if corporate card is unavailable

entities.name: Airline Selection Priority
entities.description: Priority order for selecting airlines: (1) Preferred carrier, (2) Star Alliance partner, (3) Lowest fare.

source_anchor.source_text: Airline selection priority: preferred carrier first, then alliance partner, then lowest fare

entities.priority_items: 1. Preferred carrier, 2. Star Alliance partner, 3. Lowest available fare
entities.tie_breaking_rule: Preferred carrier wins unless fare differential exceeds $200

entities.name: 14-Day Advance Booking Window
entities.description: Air tickets must be booked at least 14 calendar days before departure.

source_anchor.source_text: 14-day advance booking requirement

entities.applies_to: Air ticket purchase date vs. departure date

entities.name: 6-Hour Flight Duration Threshold
entities.description: The 6-hour boundary that determines class of service eligibility.

source_anchor.source_text: 6-hour threshold for class upgrade eligibility

entities.name: $200 Fare Differential Threshold
entities.description: Maximum acceptable fare difference between preferred and non-preferred airlines.

source_anchor.source_text: $200 fare differential threshold

entities.applies_to: Price gap between preferred and lowest alternative fare

entities.name: Pre-Travel Security Briefing
entities.description: Mandatory security briefing for all high-risk zone travel.

source_anchor.source_text: Security briefing required for high-risk travel

entities.name: Evacuation Plan Filing
entities.description: Mandatory evacuation plan submission before high-risk zone travel.

source_anchor.source_text: Evacuation plan must be filed

entities.name: Daily Check-In
entities.description: Mandatory daily check-in for travelers in high-risk zones.

source_anchor.source_text: Daily check-in mandatory in high-risk zones

entities.name: Post-Travel Expense Report
entities.description: All travel expenses must be submitted via expense report within 30 days of return.

source_anchor.source_text: Expense reports due within 30 days of return

entities.name: Expense Reimbursement Denied
entities.description: Non-compliant expenses will not be reimbursed by the organization.

source_anchor.source_text: Non-compliant expenses will not be reimbursed

entities.name: Travel Privileges Suspended
entities.description: Repeated policy violations may result in temporary suspension of travel privileges.

source_anchor.source_text: Repeated violations may result in travel privilege suspension

entities.name: Emergency Evacuation Triggered
entities.description: Security incident results in mandatory evacuation via International SOS.

source_anchor.source_text: Security incidents may trigger mandatory evacuation
